calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden on behalf of the Finder. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon will submit a revised order reducing the statutory fees. The Court will not rule on the issue regarding payment to Mr. Madden stating that the agreement was between him and his Client and that the Court was not prepared to instruct without the identity of the Finder.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
